### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containerd/platforms (github.com/containerd/platforms)</summary>

### [`v1.0.0-rc.3`](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/releases/tag/v1.0.0-rc.3)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/compare/v1.0.0-rc.2...v1.0.0-rc.3)

#### What's Changed

- Update GitHub actions by [@​dmcgowan](https://redirect.github.com/dmcgowan) in [#​27](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/pull/27)
- Add support for OS Features in the format by [@​dmcgowan](https://redirect.github.com/dmcgowan) in [#​16](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/pull/16)
- Match and Compare platforms with OSFeatures by [@​dmcgowan](https://redirect.github.com/dmcgowan) in [#​20](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/pull/20)
- Add encoding to os version and features by [@​dmcgowan](https://redirect.github.com/dmcgowan) in [#​28](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/platforms/pull/28)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/containerd/platforms/compare/v1.0.0-rc.2...v1.0.0-rc.3>

</details>
